adapt.workspaceTree: ${(()=>{const src=Array.isArray(data)?data:[];const seen={};const list=src.filter(item=>{const k=String((item&&item.path)||'');if(!k){return false;}if(seen[k]){return false;}seen[k]=true;return true;});const fn='workspace-tree-filter-form';const keyword=((getFormValue(fn,'keyword')||'')+'').trim();const isDir=(item)=>item&&(item.is_dir==='1'||item.is_dir===1||item.is_dir===true);const normalizeRoot=(item)=>Object.assign({}, item, { children: undefined, isLeaf: !isDir(item), key: item.file_id||item.path||item.name, title: item.name, __lazy_loaded: false });if(!keyword){return list.map(normalizeRoot);}const roots=[];const nodeMap={};const getOrCreate=(keyPath, title, realPath, dir)=>{if(!nodeMap[keyPath]){nodeMap[keyPath]={key:keyPath,title,path:realPath,is_dir:dir?1:0,children:[],__lazy_loaded:true,isLeaf:!dir};}return nodeMap[keyPath];};const fileList=list.filter(item=>!isDir(item));for(const item of fileList){const fullPath=(item&&item.path)?String(item.path):'';if(!fullPath){continue;}const displayPath=(item&&item.path_display)?String(item.path_display):fullPath;const parts=displayPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);if(parts.length===0){continue;}let parentList=roots;let curDisplay='';for(let i=0;i<parts.length;i++){const seg=parts[i];curDisplay+='/'+seg;const last=i===parts.length-1;const node=getOrCreate(curDisplay, seg, last?fullPath:curDisplay, last?isDir(item):true);if(parentList.indexOf(node)<0){parentList.push(node);}if(last){Object.assign(node, item, { key: item.file_id||curDisplay, title: item.name||seg, path: fullPath, path_display: displayPath, __lazy_loaded:true, children: isDir(item)?(Array.isArray(node.children)?node.children:[]):undefined, isLeaf: !isDir(item) });}if(!Array.isArray(node.children)){node.children=[];}parentList=node.children;}}const prune=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}return nodes.filter(n=>{if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){n.children=prune(n.children);}const dir=(n.is_dir==='1'||n.is_dir===1||n.is_dir===true);return !dir || (Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0);});};const sortTree=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}nodes.sort((a,b)=>{const aDir=(a.is_dir==='1'||a.is_dir===1||a.is_dir===true);const bDir=(b.is_dir==='1'||b.is_dir===1||b.is_dir===true);if(aDir!==bDir){return aDir?-1:1;}return String(a.title||a.name||'').localeCompare(String(b.title||b.name||''));});nodes.forEach(n=>{if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){sortTree(n.children);}});return nodes;};return sortTree(prune(roots));})()}

adapt.workspaceRecentFileList: ${(()=>{const src=Array.isArray(data)?data:[];const isDir=(n)=>n&&(n.is_dir==='1'||n.is_dir===1||n.is_dir===true);const fmt=(n)=>{const l1=n.title||n.name||'未命名';const l2=n.sub_title||n.cn_title||n.name_zh||n.title_zh||'';return (!isDir(n)&&l2)?(l1+'('+l2+')'):l1;};const walk=(arr)=>{if(!Array.isArray(arr)){return [];}return arr.map(n=>{const children=Array.isArray(n&&n.children)?walk(n.children):undefined;const out=Object.assign({},n,{title:fmt(n),display_title:fmt(n)});if(children){out.children=children;}return out;});};return walk(src);})()}

adapt.workspaceHttpTree: ${(()=>{const src=Array.isArray(data)?data:[];const isDir=(n)=>n&&(n.is_dir==='1'||n.is_dir===1||n.is_dir===true);const fmt=(n)=>{const l1=n.title||n.name||'未命名';const l2=n.sub_title||n.cn_title||n.name_zh||n.title_zh||'';return (!isDir(n)&&l2)?(l1+'('+l2+')'):l1;};const walk=(arr)=>{if(!Array.isArray(arr)){return [];}return arr.map(n=>{const children=Array.isArray(n&&n.children)?walk(n.children):undefined;const dir=isDir(n);const rawId=String(n.id||'');const bizId=String(dir?(n.doc_group_id||(rawId.startsWith('g_')?rawId.replace(/^g_/,''):rawId)||''):(n.collect_doc_id||(rawId.startsWith('d_')?rawId.replace(/^d_/,''):rawId)||''));const key=String(n.key||rawId||(dir?('g_'+bizId):('d_'+bizId)));const out=Object.assign({},n,{key,id:bizId,type:dir?'dir':'http',title:fmt(n),display_title:fmt(n)});if(children){out.children=children;}return out;});};return walk(src);})()}

children.css: .workspace-http-doc{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfefc 0%,#ffffff 100%);overflow:auto;padding:8px;}.workspace-http-hero{border:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.08);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(24,226,153,0.08),rgba(24,226,153,0) 56%),#ffffff;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.03);}.workspace-http-hero-top{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;flex-wrap:nowrap;}.workspace-http-hero-main{min-width:0;flex:1 1 auto;}.workspace-http-headline{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;min-width:0;}.workspace-http-method{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:20px;padding:0 7px;border-radius:999px;background:#d4fae8;color:#0fa76e;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.4px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;flex:0 0 auto;}.workspace-http-path{display:block;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;font-size:11px;line-height:16px;color:#0d0d0d;}.workspace-http-title-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;min-width:0;margin-top:5px;}.workspace-http-title{display:block;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font-size:16px;line-height:20px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-0.2px;color:#0d0d0d;font-family:Inter,'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif;}.workspace-http-subtitle{display:block;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font-size:11px;line-height:16px;color:#6b7280;}.workspace-http-title-dot{flex:0 0 auto;color:#c7ccd4;font-size:10px;line-height:16px;}.workspace-http-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex:0 0 auto;flex-wrap:nowrap;}.workspace-http-meta-card{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border:1px solid rgba(15,23,42,0.12);border-radius:999px;padding:5px 10px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f8fafc 100%);white-space:nowrap;}.workspace-http-meta-label{font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;font-size:9px;line-height:12px;letter-spacing:0.25px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#64748b;white-space:nowrap;}.workspace-http-meta-value{margin-top:0;font-size:12px;line-height:16px;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;white-space:nowrap;}.workspace-http-section{margin-top:8px;border:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.08);border-radius:10px;background:#ffffff;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.02);overflow:hidden;}.workspace-http-section-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.06);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fcfdfc 0%,#f6faf8 100%);}.workspace-http-section-title{font-size:12px;line-height:16px;font-weight:600;color:#0d0d0d;font-family:Inter,'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif;}.workspace-http-section-caption{font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;font-size:9px;line-height:12px;letter-spacing:0.3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b7280;}.workspace-http-info-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1fr);gap:8px;}.workspace-http-callout{padding:10px 12px;font-size:12px;line-height:18px;color:#374151;white-space:pre-wrap;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#fbfcfc 100%);}.workspace-http-callout-muted{color:#475467;}.workspace-http-note-list{padding:6px 10px 8px 10px;display:block;}.workspace-http-note-item{font-size:11px;line-height:16px;color:#1f2937;padding:6px 0 6px 8px;border-bottom:1px dashed rgba(16,24,40,0.1);background:transparent;}.workspace-http-note-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}.workspace-http-code-panel{height:260px;padding:0;overflow:hidden;background:#0b1020;}.workspace-http-code-shell{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:7px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);background:#11182d;}.workspace-http-code-shell-title{font-size:11px;line-height:16px;font-weight:600;color:#f3f4f6;font-family:Inter,'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif;}.workspace-http-code-shell-badge{font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;font-size:9px;line-height:14px;letter-spacing:0.3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#a7f3d0;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.2);border-radius:999px;padding:0 6px;}.workspace-http-code-editor{height:calc(100% - 34px);}.workspace-http-table-wrap{padding:6px 8px 8px 8px;background:#ffffff;}.workspace-http-demo-wrap{padding:8px;background:#ffffff;}.workspace-http-demo-card{border:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.08);border-radius:8px;background:#ffffff;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:6px;}.workspace-http-demo-trigger{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 10px;font-size:12px;line-height:16px;font-weight:600;color:#0d0d0d;cursor:pointer;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fcfdfc 0%,#f7f9f8 100%);}.workspace-http-demo-state{font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;font-size:9px;line-height:12px;letter-spacing:0.3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b7280;}.workspace-http-demo-body{padding:8px 10px;border-top:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.06);font-size:12px;line-height:18px;white-space:pre-wrap;color:#374151;background:#ffffff;}.workspace-http-empty{padding:16px;color:#98a2b3;font-size:12px;line-height:18px;}@media (max-width:1200px){.workspace-http-hero-top{flex-wrap:wrap;}.workspace-http-meta{gap:6px;}.workspace-http-info-grid{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr);}}@media (max-width:768px){.workspace-http-doc{padding:6px;}.workspace-http-hero{padding:8px 10px;}.workspace-http-title-row,.workspace-http-headline{display:block;}.workspace-http-title-dot{display:none;}.workspace-http-title,.workspace-http-subtitle,.workspace-http-path{white-space:normal;overflow:visible;text-overflow:clip;}.workspace-http-meta{flex-wrap:wrap;}}

value.workspaceHttpConsoleStatus: ${(()=>{const removeKey=String(key||'');const active=String(workspaceHttpWorkbenchActiveKey||'');const list=Array.isArray(workspaceHttpWorkbenchTabs)?workspaceHttpWorkbenchTabs:[];const idx=list.findIndex(item=>String(item.key||'')===removeKey);if(idx<0){return String(workspaceHttpConsoleStatus||'');}const next=list.filter((item,i)=>i!==idx);if(!next.length){return '请选择左侧 HTTP 节点';}let pick=null;if(active!==removeKey){pick=next.find(item=>String(item.key||'')===active)||next[0];}else{pick=next[Math.min(idx,next.length-1)]||next[0];}const id=String((pick&&pick.docId)||'');if(!id){return '请选择左侧 HTTP 节点';}const cache=(workspaceHttpDocCacheMap||{})[id]||{};const selected=cache.selectedDoc||{};return '已切换 '+String(selected.title||pick.docTitle||'HTTP请求');})()}

action.title: 请先选择 HTTP 接口

value.workspaceHttpWorkbenchTabs: ${(()=>{const id=String((workspaceHttpSelectedDoc&&workspaceHttpSelectedDoc.collect_doc_id)||workspaceHttpConsoleDocId||'').trim();const title=String((workspaceHttpSelectedDoc&&workspaceHttpSelectedDoc.title)||(workspaceHttpTreeSelected&&workspaceHttpTreeSelected.title)||'HTTP请求');const list=Array.isArray(workspaceHttpWorkbenchTabs)?workspaceHttpWorkbenchTabs:[];if(!id){return list;}const key='console:'+id;const label=title+' · 接口控制台';const idx=list.findIndex(item=>String(item.key||'')===key);if(idx>=0){const next=[...list];next[idx]=Object.assign({},next[idx],{label:label,tabType:'console',docId:id,docTitle:title});return next;}return [...list,{key:key,label:label,tabType:'console',docId:id,docTitle:title}];})()}
